title: The Man Who Saw Frankenstein Cry
original_title: El hombre que vio llorar a Frankenstein
overview: King of Horror, legendary actor, scriptwriter and director, Paul Naschy is regarded as the Spanish Lon Chaney and the most prolific filmmaker dedicated to the fantastic cinema in Spain.
